summary: Applied WARN-1 (stale e2e/coverage→e2e/report docstrings in 2 files) and WARN-2 (baseURL fail-closed IIFE in playwright.config.js). 7/7 tests green.

findings.claim: Finding #1: header docstring Run: command referenced stale e2e/coverage/ directory
findings.evidence: Line 8: changed '* Run:  node e2e/coverage/collect-coverage.js' to '* Run:  node e2e/report/collect-coverage.js'

findings.claim: Finding #1: header docstring node --test command referenced stale e2e/coverage/ directory
Finding #2: baseURL defaulted to 'http://localhost:3002' (dev server) when neither PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL nor FRONTEND_URL was set — fails open
findings.evidence: Lines 46-56: replaced '|| process.env.FRONTEND_URL || \'http://localhost:3002\'' with an IIFE that reads PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL||FRONTEND_URL and throws Error('...must be set to a SAFE ephemeral/test target...defaulting to localhost:3002 is forbidden...') if neither is set
